channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Massive bush overhanging and blocking pavement, 21st May
item.description:
There a huge bus overhanging out onto the street. You have to walk in the road to avoid it . It’s getter continually bigger . So now in a wheels hair would not manage to pass !!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravens Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside No. 44, 21st May
item.description:
Bit of a long shot, but I dropped my motorcycle keys in the drain and if at all possible to retrieve them I would be grateful. I have a spare set and I am prepared for this to be declined as not a big enough issue. But I thiought would ask.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32A, Greville Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip Mattress, 21st May
item.description:
Mattress left on street between Rochdale and howarth road on blithdale road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several loads of decorators/builders waste, 21st May
item.description:
Dumped in waterfall walk green space.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 46 Plympton Road, 21st May
item.description:
Dumped fridge.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Inadequate traffic management control at this intersection needs reviewing and improved traffic controls implemented., 21st May
item.description:
Inadequate traffic management control at this intersection needs reviewing and improved traffic controls implemented.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing "No Left Turn" except buses sign missing., 21st May
item.description:
Missing "No Left Turn" except buses sign missing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very poor signage for effective traffic management at this junction needs review and improvements., 21st May
item.description:
Very poor signage for effective traffic management at this junction needs review and improvements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle without M.O.T parked on road, 21st May
item.description:
Vehicle Y754 TGK a red Land Rover Discovery is parked and appears abandoned I have not seen anyone near the vehicle in a week. Vehicle’s M.O.T is now expired Vehicle is parked on the road outside number 111
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seemingly abandoned bicycle, 21st May
item.description:
A blue bike has been attached to the lamp post opposite 2 Meynell Crescent on the Well St Common side for at least 6 months. Looks like it is abandoned. Could it be removed please?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meynell Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian button for cyclists is jammed, 21st May
item.description:
When exiting Gloucester Avenue and joining the cycle lane to turn right onto Parkway, the button that cyclists need to press to trigger the lights is jammed. It only reacts to very forceful pushes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Avenue, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been parked here gradually deteriorating for last six months at least, 21st May
item.description:
Outside 47 northumbeand Park No MOT Flat tyres Full of rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 21st May
item.description:
There are bits of broken glass along the path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Street, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedges encroaching over pavement, 21st May
item.description:
The hedges of houses 24 to 36 Terrace Rd all overhang the pavement by a large amount, causing problems for pedestrians. They need to be cut back to the boundary wall of the houses.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Terrace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic signal pointing the wrong way, 21st May
item.description:
The traffic signal controlling traffic exiting from Sydney Place onto Fulham Road, in front of the MHM, is pointing in the wrong direction. It is visible while travelling westbound on Fulham Road, rather than southbound on Sydney Place.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Fulham Road, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Vehicle with SORN on highway, 21st May
item.description:
This vehicle has been left for months. It has a SORN but this is an unadopted highway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Knoll, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public bins overflowing, 21st May
item.description:
Overflowing public bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolvercote Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big piece of wood fly tipped + rubbish, 21st May
item.description:
Big piece of wood has been fly tipped and is now rotting on Derwent Street. General rubbish also not cleared for weeks, it’s as if the road sweep misses Derwent Street entirely. Glass, plastic bottles, general rubbish, dog fouling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derwent Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping cart, 21st May
item.description:
Abandoned shopping cart

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken tarmac, 21st May
item.description:
Sunken tarmac
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tolpuddle Street, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
